case_title: ANDRE BAYLOR VS. NGAN NHI MUI

docket_entries.description: REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 9/30/16 RETURNED BY U.S. POSTAL SERVICE LABELED "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $110.00 FILED BY BAYLOR, ANDRE AS TO DEFENDANT MUI, NGAN NHI DBA. MISSION CLEANERS COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAYLOR, ANDRE AS TO DEFENDANT MUI, NGAN NHI DBA. MISSION CLEANERS COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-02-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT BUT DID NOT SIGN CERTIFIED MAIL CARD AND NEEDS CANTONESE INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-13-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MUI, NGAN NHI DBA. MISSION CLEANERS COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-02-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ANDRE BAYLOR. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT NGAN NHI MUI DBA MISSION CLEANERS COMPANY WITH COURT PROVIDED CANTONESE INTERPRETER BANNIE CHOW. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2016 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAYLOR, ANDRE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-18-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MUI, NGAN NHI DBA. MISSION CLEANERS COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAYLOR, ANDRE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUI, NGAN NHI DBA. MISSION CLEANERS COMPANY $45.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $45.00, NO COSTS ORDERED BY THE COURT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
